column1: # Casbin ABAC policy — generated from authorization-matrix.md

#   true                         — access granted; all scope/filter logic at query layer

#     search — list/search brokers by name or license (e.g. GET /brokers?q=...)

#     Underwriter receives read only — no list/search access.

# Scope: brokers within the user's programs; enforced at query layer.

# §2.4 Renewal — Read / Create / Update / Transition / Assign (F0007 update + F0034 attributes)
# Transitions must follow workflow rules — see F0007 README transition matrix.
# Per-transition role authorization is enforced at the application layer (ADR-011).
# Casbin gates the broad action; app service gates specific from→to pairs.
# DistributionUser scope: assigned opportunities only. DistributionManager: region-scoped.
#   create     — create renewal from expiring policy
#   update     — update dynamic LOB attributes on non-terminal renewals

# §2.4a Account — Read / Create / Update / Lifecycle / Merge / Contact / Relationship
# Query-layer scope mirrors the feature-local account contract (F0016).
# §2.4b Policy — Read / Create / Update / Issue / Endorse / Cancel / Reinstate / Coverage:Manage / Import
# Query-layer scope: policies the caller can read via account + broker ABAC scope.
# State-aware restrictions are enforced in the application layer:

#   coverage:manage is Pending-state CRUD for DistributionUser/DistributionManager/Underwriter/Admin; Issued-state changes go through policy:endorse.

# BrokerUser is external and read-first in Phase 1.
# Scope + field filtering constraints are enforced at query/response layer:
#   - broker scope resolves from authenticated broker_tenant_id -> exactly one active tenant mapping
#   - default deny if claim missing or mapping count != 1

#   dashboard_pipeline — DENY: entirely submission/renewal status counts; no BrokerVisible data.
#   dashboard_nudge   — ALLOW with mandatory query-layer scope filter:
#                       return only OverdueTask nudges where linkedEntityType='Broker'
#                       AND linkedEntityId IN resolved broker scope.
#                       StaleSubmission and UpcomingRenewal types excluded at query layer.
